title: YTP- Sergeant Johnson prepares to drop his pants
description:
Halo 3 ODST- themed poop that I was gonna upload in time for ODST's launch but didn't because uh... well because I was playing ODST I guess.
Nothing too special here, I got a bit bored towards the end, but the last line makes it all the more worthwhile.
